prompt_text: Copper vs Pipedrive pricing and features
response:
# Copper vs Pipedrive: Comparison

## Pricing

| Feature | Copper | Pipedrive |
|---------|--------|----------|
| **Entry Level** | Free plan available | Free plan available |
| **Mid Tier** | $25/user/month | $14/user/month |
| **Pro Tier** | $65/user/month | $39/user/month |
| **Enterprise** | Custom pricing | $59-99/user/month |

## Key Features Comparison

### Copper (Salesforce-Integrated)
✅ **Strengths:**
- Native Google Workspace integration (Gmail, Calendar, Drive)
- Automatic contact and email capture
- Built-in relationship intelligence
- No-code customization
- Better for Gmail-heavy teams

❌ **Limitations:**
- Fewer advanced customization options
- Smaller app ecosystem
- Less flexible pipeline management

### Pipedrive (Standalone CRM)
✅ **Strengths:**
- More affordable entry point
- Highly visual, deal-focused interface
- Extensive app marketplace (500+ integrations)
- Better for sales process tracking
- More customizable pipelines

❌ **Limitations:**
- Requires manual data entry
- Less native integration with email
- Steeper learning curve for complex workflows

## Best For

| Choose **Copper** if you... | Choose **Pipedrive** if you... |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|
| Use Google Workspace daily | Need maximum customization |
| Want minimal setup time | Want lower per-user costs |
| Prefer automation over manual work | Prioritize deal pipeline visuals |
| Have a small-to-mid team | Want extensive marketplace apps |

**Bottom line:** Copper = best for Gmail users; Pipedrive = best for budget-conscious sales teams.
